description: Shared preview/process contract for V3 auto-Logo resolution. Both the TS resolver in apps/web/src/autoLogo.ts and the Python V3 resolver in packages/kari-core/src/kari_core/processor/v3_renderer.py::_resolve_auto_logo_path must produce the same stem (or null) for every case here. V3 policy: builtin-only registry, whole-token match, NO fujifilm fallback.

cases.note: multi-token make matches on whole token
unknown brand — V3 does NOT fall back to fujifilm
tokens shorter than 3 chars are discarded
case-preserving stem match (registry order is case-insensitive)
